workflow.intent: Generate a read-only receipt for an agent-assisted Aave pool risk review before any user-facing position action is prepared.

cost.note: Read-only example; no supply, borrow, withdrawal, repayment, liquidation, signature, or transaction.

execution.recovery_state: Require verified Aave reserve data, oracle context, liquidation policy, health-factor policy, and human approval before preparing any user-facing action.

evidence.summary: The receipt records read-only Aave pool risk-review context and explicitly blocks capital movement, signing, liquidation, and recommendations.

artifacts.reason: Example uses placeholder reserve context and no wallet-specific position data.

privacy.disclosure: Pool-review method, policy limits, and stop condition are visible; wallet, position, and exact user intent remain redacted.

review_notes: This fixture is not investment advice and does not prepare or execute an Aave position action.
The agent is explicitly denied supply, borrow, withdrawal, repayment, liquidation, signing, and recommendation authority.
A production integration should connect verified Aave pool and oracle data sources while preserving the same no-custody, no-unsupervised-capital-movement boundary.
